title: sphaeropteris teysmannii
intro: Sphaeropteris teysmannii, also known as the Java fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Cyathea. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Sphaeropteris teysmannii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce stress and inflammation in the body. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
